title: Datadog provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Datadog APM + events integration.

api_key.description: Datadog API key. 32-character hex string. Encrypted at rest. Sent as DD-API-KEY header.

application_key.description: Datadog application key. 40-character hex string. Encrypted at rest. Sent as DD-APPLICATION-KEY header.

site.description: Datadog deployment region. Determines the events endpoint URL.

priority.description: Datadog event priority. 'normal' shows in stream; 'low' filters out of default stream.

default_tags.description: Optional default tags applied to every dispatched event. Format: 'key:value'. Example: ['env:production', 'service:api'].

aggregation_key_prefix.description: Optional prefix for Datadog's event aggregation_key. Alerts on the same policy dedupe via aggregation_key = prefix + policy_id.

attach_signal_context_as_tags.description: true = alert.signal_context jsonb keys become Datadog event tags. false = signal_context serialized into event text only.
